subject: Ornate stone blades arranged in a decorative composition; weapons rendered as a stylized motif within a red, embossed frame treatment characteristic of War of the Spark's alternate-frame art for spells
description: The card uses War of the Spark's alternate frame-art treatment: instead of a traditional illustrated scene, the art window is filled with a decorative motif of stone blades or carved weapon shapes against a deep red, almost rust-toned ground. The composition is ornamental rather than narrative — the blades read as iconography or heraldic relief, with dark silhouettes catching warm rim highlights. No figures are depicted; the imagery is symbolic of Nahiri's lithomantic weaponry referenced in the flavor text about Sorin and Nahiri battling across Ravnica.
foreground: stylized stone blades / carved weapon shapes in dark silhouette
background: deep red embossed frame treatment, ornamental panel
emotion: n/a — no figures; tone is grim and martial
